message.content:
@startuml
title User Log in

hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  LifeLineBorderColor #666666
  LifeLineBorderThickness 1
  ParticipantBorderColor #333333
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
  ParticipantFontSize 22
  TitleFontSize 28
  MessageFontSize 22
  ArrowColor #111111
  ArrowThickness 2
}

participant "client" as client
participant "/auth" as auth
participant "AuthDatabase" as db
participant "/user" as user

client -> auth : POST\nusername/password
auth -> db : authToken
auth --> client : RESPONSE\nauthToken

client -> user : GET\nauthToken/userId
user --> client : RESPONSE\nuser profile data

@enduml
